---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new SQL feature, operator, optimizer rule, or API endpoint
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed solution

Describe your proposed design or implementation approach.
If this is a new SQL operator, include example SQL and expected output.

```sql
-- Example SQL that would use the new feature
SELECT ...
```

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you considered and why you rejected them.

## Additional context

Links to relevant SQL standard sections, prior art, or related issues.
